item.title: Images of Note: I am literally just vibing
item.description:
The hole
mood
DISGUSTING!
yeah...DOESN'T STOP IT FROM BEING DARK THOUGH
Do it
F R I C K
the worst aged tweet
so scary
aaaaaaaaaaaa
FUCK
meow
(it's because they voted for trump because they wanted things to happen to other people)
this tune is what I imagine dying in a night club toilet sounds like
D:
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging http://bsky.abbii.gay: For Bluesky The days are shortening because the sun is going away. Bring it back by sacrificing Donald Trump to the Sun on Christmas Day!
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Sitting on a dock watching dolphins = good, wholesome, family entertainment.
item.description: I loved the way the kid was so excited he started clapping. It's awesome little moments like this that can inspire people to grow up to be a marine biologist or something. All of the pics and videos I post are taken by me. For more OC nature vids check my profile or look for See Through Canoe Company on YouTube, FB & other social media sites.
item.dc:creator: SeeThroughCanoe

item.dc:creator: SkyPigeon123

item.title: I love it and yet it feels like we have to defend it.
item.description: I specifically told him to not get anything expensive, to not get something flashy and to not get something that is irreplaceable. AND YET, people are judging him (even though they try to twist into curiosity). Its tearing him down and its making him feel bad. But I didnt want him to spend alot of money. We arent in that position financially and I hardly wear any jewelry. I also lose shit way too easily for something expensive
item.dc:creator: SpriteandCats

item.title: Please, i need distractions, not reminders that stoke my fear
item.description: It's been a week, i need distractions so i can put it out of my mind and function, and at least go back to sleeping through the night again
item.dc:creator: darkninja2992

item.title: What is wrong with people
item.description: The cop came to do the report and asked me where he was. I told him that the man didn’t want to wait and said to just give them his info… the cop steps away and I hear him asking for another officer to drive to the man’s house. They had time today lol
item.dc:creator: zoraniko
